zh.lifeSummary: 當Thomas West 2nd Baron West於1392年出生在英國哈普爾歐阿韓格時，他的父親Sir Thomas West 1st Baron West27歲，母親Joan la Warre29歲。他於1406年7月2日之前與Ida de St Amand在英國戴文達特姆斯結婚。他們至少是2個女兒的父母。他去世於1415年9月30日在英國素可艾欽加姆享年23歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Thomas West 2nd Baron West于1392年出生在英国哈普爾歐阿韓格时，他的父亲Sir Thomas West 1st Baron West27岁，母亲Joan la Warre29岁。他于1406年7月2日之前与Ida de St Amand在英国戴文達特姆斯结婚。他们至少是2个女儿的父母。他去世于1415年9月30日在英国素可艾欽加姆享年23岁。

nameMeanings.name: West
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and German: from Middle English, Middle High German west ‘west’, hence a topographic name for someone who lived to the west of a settlement, or a habitational name for someone who had migrated from further west.
Americanized form of Finnish Vesterinen: from the personal name Vesteri (a short form of Sylvester ) + the surname suffix -nen.

History: This name was brought to North America independently by many bearers in the 17th and 18th centuries. Thomas West, 12th Baron De La Warre, was captain general of Virginia in 1610–11. The state of DE is named for him. One of the earliest permanent settlers was Francis West (1606–92), who came to Duxbury, MA, from Salisbury, Wiltshire, England, in or before 1638.

variants.name: Western
meanings: English: from Middle English westerne ‘western’, denoting ‘(the man from the) west’. Compare West and Wester .
Norwegian: habitational name from the farm name Vestern, found in two places, a compound of vest ‘west’ + vin ‘meadow’, denoting a farm to the west.

variants.name: Sylvester
meanings: English and German: from the Middle English and Latin personal name Silvester ‘dweller in the forest’ (a derivative of silva ‘wood’). The name was borne by three popes, including a contemporary of Constantine the Great, and seems to have been first used in England by clerics.

variants.name: Westman
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Scandinavian Birgit, Erik, Hilmer, Nels.
Swedish: ornamental or topographic name from (an altered form of) the elements väst ‘west’ + -man. It is also found in Finland.
Americanized form of German Westmann: variant of West , with the addition of Middle High German man ‘man’.

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

en.lifeSummary: When Thomas West 2nd Baron West was born in 1392, in Oakhanger, Hampshire, England, his father, Sir Thomas West 1st Baron West, was 27 and his mother, Joan la Warre, was 29. He married Ida de St Amand before 2 July 1406, in Dartmouth, Devon, England. They were the parents of at least 2 daughters. He died on 30 September 1415, in Etchingham, Sussex, England, at the age of 23.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Thomas West 2nd Baron West est né en 1392, à Oakhanger, Hampshire, Angleterre, son père, Sir Thomas West 1st Baron West, avait 27 ans et sa mère, Joan la Warre, avait 29 ans. Il a épousé Ida de St Amand avant 2 juillet 1406, à Dartmouth, Devon, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 filles. Il est décédé le 30 septembre 1415, à Etchingham, Sussex, Angleterre, à l’âge de 23 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Thomas West 2nd Baron West 1392 in Oakhanger, Hampshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Thomas West 1st Baron West 27 und seine Mutter Joan la Warre 29. Er hat vor 2. Juli 1406 in Dartmouth, Devon, England Ida de St Amand geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Töchter. Er starb am 30. September 1415 im Alter von 23 Jahren in Etchingham, Sussex, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas West 2nd Baron West è nato il nel 1392 nel Oakhanger, Hampshire, England, il suo padre, Sir Thomas West 1st Baron West, aveva 27 anni e il suo madre, Joan la Warre, aveva 29 anni. Lui sposato Ida de St Amand prima del 2 luglio 1406, nel Dartmouth, Devon, England. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figlie. Morì il 30 settembre 1415, nel Etchingham, Sussex, England, all'età di 23 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Thomas West 2nd Baron Westが1392年にイギリスハンプシュアイアオアクハンジャーで生まれた時，父Sir Thomas West 1st Baron Westは27歳，母Joan la Warreは29歳であった。1406年7月2日以前にイギリスデボンダルトモウスでIda de St Amandと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の娘の親であった。彼は1415年9月30日にイギリススセックスエトチンガムで23歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Thomas West 2nd Baron West(이)가 1392년 영국 함프실르 k핸거에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Thomas West 1st Baron West(은)는 27세였고, 그의 어머니 Joan la Warre(은)는 29세였다. 그는 1406년 7월 2일 이전 영국 데폰 더르트모우스에서 Ida de St Amand(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1415년 9월 30일 영국 수세스 트친그함에서 23세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas West 2nd Baron West nasceu em 1392, em Oakhanger, Hampshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Thomas West 1st Baron West, tinha 27 anos e sua mãe, Joan la Warre, tinha 29 anos. Ele casou-se com Ida de St Amand antes 2 de julho de 1406, em Dartmouth, Devon, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 30 de setembro de 1415, em Etchingham, Sussex, Inglaterra, com 23 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Thomas West 2nd Baron West родился в 1392 г. в местности оахангир, хампшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir Thomas West 1st Baron West было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Joan la Warre, 29. Он женился на женщине по имени Ida de St Amand перед 2 июля 1406 г. в местности дартмоут, девон, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 дочери. Он умер 30 сентября 1415 г. в местности эчингхам, суссекс, Англия в возрасте 23 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Thomas West 2nd Baron West nació en 1392, en Oakhanger, Hampshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir Thomas West 1st Baron West, tenía 27 años y su mamá, Joan la Warre, tenía 29 años. Se casó con Ida de St Amand antes de 2 de julio de 1406, en Dartmouth, Devon, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijas. Murió el 30 de septiembre de 1415, en Etchingham, Sussex, Inglaterra, a la edad de 23 años.
